title: String Duper
description: StringDuper restores classic tripwire string duping in Minecraft using a controlled tick-based system. Farms only run when the setup, water, and conditions are valid, with safety checks that reduce lag and prevent accidental activation.
body:

---

# StringDuper

StringDuper transforms string farming into a stable, optimized, and multiplayer-friendly mechanic using deterministic server-side processing, strict structure validation, and smart farm management systems.

Instead of relying on unstable vanilla duplication behavior, the mod provides a cleaner and more scalable farming experience focused on predictable behavior, reduced lag, optimized item spawning, and safer long-term multiplayer performance.

StringDuper preserves the gameplay feel of traditional string dupers while improving stability, scalability, and overall server performance.

---

# Features

* Deterministic server-side farm processing
* Optimized stacked item spawning
* Smart overlap-aware farm detection
* Side-by-side farm compatibility
* Strict tripwire structure validation
* Configurable active farm limits
* 64-block player proximity activation system
* Reduced entity and physics lag
* Cached farm validation system
* Event-assisted hook tracking
* Silent production behavior with optional debug mode
* Multiplayer-safe farm management
* Configurable spawn intervals and batch sizes
* Lightweight tick-based processing

Default configuration:

* Maximum active farms across the server: 32
* Maximum active farms per world: 16
* Unlimited per-player farms enabled by default
* Debug mode disabled by default
* Player feedback messages enabled
* Warning messages are rate-limited to reduce spam
* Farms generate output every 20 ticks (1 second)

All default configuration values can be changed inside:

* For Mods: `config/StringDuper.json`
* For Plugins: `plugins/StringDuper/StringDuper.json`

### ( We advise against making changes to the JSON file unless it is necessary )

---

# Limitations

* Farms require players within a 64-block radius to remain active
* Tripwire chains must remain fully attached
* Maximum chain distance is limited
* Invalid or incomplete structures are automatically suppressed
* Overlapping or intersecting farms are blocked
* Farms require proper hook, trapdoor, lever, and water placement
* Excessively dense farm stacking is prevented
* Farms only operate while the structure remains fully valid

---

# Warning

* Overlapping or intersecting farms are intentionally suppressed
* Breaking tripwire structure integrity immediately disables the farm
* Extremely large-scale farm abuse may still impact server performance
* Debug mode should remain disabled during normal production gameplay
